articles.author: Michael  Kaplan, Jo Ling  Kent, Emily  Pandise, Eleanor  Watson
articles.title: Internal Pentagon memo orders military commanders to remove Anthropic AI technology from key systems - CBS News
articles.description: The Defense Department has notified senior leadership that they must remove Anthropic's products from their system within 180 days, the latest salvo in a feud between the AI company and the Trump administration.
articles.content: The Defense Department has officially notified senior leadership figures throughout the U.S. military that they must remove Anthropic's artificial intelligence products from their systems within 180 … [+4283 chars]
